OUR SERVICES

From Concept to Completion,
We’ve Got You Covered.

  • 10 years of combined experience
  • Licensed, insured and certified
  • Unmatched service standards

Accessory Dwelling Unit

Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs) are a smart way to add value and functionality to your property, whether as extra living space, a rental opportunity, or a comfortable guest house — and JRH Constructions delivers custom ADUs built with quality and care.

Home Additions

Home Additions are the perfect way to expand your living space without moving. JRH Constructions designs and builds seamless extensions that blend comfort, style, and value into your home.

Bathroom Remodeling

Bathroom Remodeling transforms your bathroom into a modern, functional, and stylish space. JRH Constructions delivers high-quality upgrades, from elegant fixtures to complete redesigns, tailored to your lifestyle.

Kitchen Remodeling

Kitchen Remodeling brings new life to the heart of your home. JRH Constructions creates modern, functional, and stylish kitchens designed to fit your needs and enhance your lifestyle.

Full Remodeling

Full Remodeling gives your entire home a fresh start. JRH Constructions transforms outdated spaces into modern, functional, and comfortable living environments tailored to your vision.

Painting

Painting is one of the simplest ways to refresh and transform your property. JRH Constructions delivers professional interior and exterior painting with flawless finishes and lasting results.

Your Dream Home, Within Reach

Bring your vision to life with renovations that combine quality craftsmanship and personalized design. From kitchen upgrades to full-scale remodels, we transform your home with care and attention to detail. Our team ensures a smooth, stress-free process, delivering the comfort, functionality, and satisfaction you deserve.

Discover More

Why Trust JRH Constructions for Your Home Renovation Needs?

General Construction: Building Spaces That Bring Everyone Together

Your home should be a perfect blend of comfort, style, and practicality. At Construction, we specialize in bathroom renovations, kitchen upgrades, and precise tile work, delivering results that are both beautiful and built to last.

Owens Corning Shingles: Reliable Protection for Your Roof

  • Durable & Weather-Resistant: Designed to withstand rain, wind, snow, and hail, keeping your home safe year-round.

  • Beautiful Designs: A wide selection of colors and classic styles to enhance your home’s look and value.

  • Premium Warranty: As a Platinum Preferred Contractor, JRH Construction provides superior warranty coverage for your Owens Corning roof.

JRH Construction: Skilled Professionals You Can Trust

  • Quality Craftsmanship: Every project is completed with care, precision, and attention to detail.

  • Customer-Focused Service: We aim to exceed expectations, making the remodeling or roofing process smooth and stress-free.

  • Free Estimates: Reach out today for a no-obligation estimate and start protecting and enhancing your home with confidence.

Invest in the best. Choose Owens Corning shingles installed by a certified Quality Roofing Pro.

Call us now

Get Free Estimate

Our Mission

Our job is to turn a construction project into a dream come true. We understand that our clients are visionaries, and when they decide to move forward with a project, they are planning for unforgettable moments.
